title: Slovakian-Style Turkey and Ham Dumplings
description: A hearty and comforting dish featuring traditional Slovakian dumplings filled with turkey and ham, served in a rich and tangy sauce.

ingredients.name: Slovakian Dumplings
ingredients.notes: Available in most European grocery stores or online

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Add the Slovakian dumplings to the boiling water and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the diced turkey and ham to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Add the cooked dumplings to the skillet and simmer for 2-3 minutes, or until they are coated in the sauce.
Stir in the sour cream and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until heated through.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
